overview.factors_detail_desc: See exactly which 5 criteria define your Nexo Score and how to improve each one.
overview.transparency_desc: Mwanga Credit operates as a marketplace — connecting you with partner microfinance institutions. Fees charged by our partners range from 5% to 30% per month. Before any contract, you will see the total cost, monthly installment, and impact on your budget. Mwanga does not charge an origination fee. Revenue is generated via commission from the funding partner.
overview.insufficient_desc: You need at least 55 points to access microcredit. Increase your score by completing more Xitique cycles, increasing your savings rate, and reducing existing debts.

simulator.amort_desc: See the month-by-month detail of each installment: how much goes to interest, how much amortizes the principal, and the outstanding balance.
simulator.edu_desc: Learn the difference between simple and compound interest with real values from your simulation.
simulator.edu_tip: 💡 The formal market uses the Price system (equal installments), based on compound interest. The difference between the two models becomes significant at high rates like 30%/month.

strategy.strategy_desc: Debt Avalanche analysis and the Risk Map are exclusive to PRO users.
strategy.avalanche_desc: The Avalanche strategy focuses on paying off debts with the highest interest rate first. It is the one that saves the most money in the long run vs Snowball.
strategy.risk_green_desc: Healthy credit, payments on time, score above 70
strategy.risk_red_desc: Score below 55, credit denied, non-payment risk
strategy.reg_desc: Mwanga Credit operates as a credit marketplace — it is not a financial institution. We act as pre-qualified intermediaries between users and microfinance institutions licensed by the Bank of Mozambique. All final credit decisions are made by funding partners. Interest rates subject to current regulation. Responsible credit: request only what you can pay.

growth.desc: The power of financial intelligence in your hand.

legacy.name: Wealth
legacy.desc: Master your legacy and secure the future.

hero.title: Mwanga Help Center
hero.description: Everything you need to know to light your financial path and master the Mwanga 2.0 system.

intro.title: 📱 First Steps
intro.content:
Mwanga is a PWA application. This means you can install it on your phone without going to the Play Store or App Store.

• On Android: Click on the 3 dots in Chrome and select "Install Financial Messenger".
• On iPhone: Use the Share button and select "Add to Home Screen".

dashboard.title: 📊 Dashboard
dashboard.content:
The Dashboard offers a 360º view of your finances.

• Radar Chart: Quickly identify if your spending is balanced with your earnings.
• Widgets: Track the total balance of your accounts and the progress of your savings goals at a glance.

finance.title: 💰 Financial Management
finance.content:
Master your money with budgeting tools.

• Transactions: Record every metical that goes out or comes in. Separate by account (M-Pesa, Wallet, Bank).
• 50/30/20 Rule: The system helps you meet the goal of spending 50% on needs, 30% on wants, and 20% for the future.
• Goals: Set clear objectives (e.g., "Motorcycle Purchase") and let Mwanga calculate how much you need to save monthly.

credit.title: ⚖️ Intelligent Credit
credit.content:
Before asking for a loan, consult our simulators.

• Installment Simulator: Know exactly how much you will pay the bank per month.
• Comparator: See if a bank loan, a Xitique, or waiting and saving is more worthwhile.
• Consolidation: Learn to combine several debts into one to pay less total interest.

community.title: 🤝 Mwanga Community (VSLA)
community.content:
Save together with your family or friends.

• Shares: In the Digital VSLA, you buy monthly "shares" that form the group's capital.
• Internal Loans: Members can request loans from the group at rates decided by the community.
• Profits: Accumulated interest is distributed equally at the end of the savings cycle.

binth.title: 🤖 Binth AI Assistant
binth.content:
Binth is the brain of Mwanga.

• Quick Diagnostics: Ask for advice on whether or not you should make a purchase.
• Real Context: Binth analyzes your real spending (anonymously) to give precise answers.

security.title: 🛡️ Security and Alerts
security.content:
Your privacy is our focus.

• Push Notifications: Enable reminders to never be caught by surprise by rent or installments.
• Protected Data: We use military-grade encryption to protect your financial records.

support.title: Still have questions?
support.description: Binth is available 24/7 to answer specific questions about your financial context.
